heroDescription: I am a software developer passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision and Desktop Application Development. I enjoy transforming ideas into real-world software solutions.
aboutText1: I enjoy transforming theoretical knowledge into real-world software projects. Throughout my education, I focused not only on learning programming but also on applying it.
aboutText2: My goal is to continuously learn new technologies and develop software that solves real-world problems.
faceDesc: Real-time face recognition system developed with C++, OpenCV, Qt Creator and CMake.
kidneyDesc: Deep learning model developed using TensorFlow for kidney stone detection.
schedulerDesc: Automatic course scheduling system developed with C#, Windows Forms and SQL Server.
contactDesc: Feel free to contact me for projects, internships or collaborations.
name: Your Name

face.title: Face Recognition System
face.description:
This project is a desktop-based face recognition system developed using C++, OpenCV, Qt Creator and CMake.

The application performs real-time face detection and recognizes registered users using the LBPH algorithm.

Features

• Real-time face detection
• Face recognition using LBPH
• User registration
• Dataset generation
• Model training
• Modern Qt interface

This project improved my skills in computer vision, image processing and desktop application development.

kidney.title: Kidney Stone Detection
kidney.description:
This project is an AI-powered medical image classification system developed using Python, TensorFlow and Keras.

A CNN model was trained to classify kidney stone images.

Features

• Medical image classification
• CNN model
• Data preprocessing
• Image augmentation
• Model evaluation
• Accuracy/Loss visualization

This project strengthened my knowledge in deep learning and artificial intelligence.

scheduler.title: Smart Course Scheduler
scheduler.description:
Smart Course Scheduler is my graduation project developed using C#, Windows Forms and SQL Server.

The application automatically generates schedules while preventing instructor, classroom and time conflicts.

Features

• Automatic scheduling
• Conflict detection
• Instructor management
• Classroom management
• Student management
• SQL Server integration

This project improved my desktop software development and database design skills.
